title: elaeocarpus miegei subsp. miegei
intro: Elaeocarpus miegei subsp. miegei is a plant species in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to New Caledonia, known for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its chemical composition, including flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus miegei subsp. miegei include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and the plant's essential oil has also been extracted for its medicinal properties.
